raw.message: Ready to learn how to mix?

hook.summary: A surprising mashup of Mariah Carey and King Von plays over a high-energy party scene.
hook.visual_action: Split screen showing Mariah Carey and King Von album covers with an app logo in the center over a dark, crowded party video.
hook.voiceover_transcript: All I want for Christmas is you... Just hopped on this next...

scene_flow: Introduction of the mashup concept with Mariah Carey's Christmas song playing over a party scene.
The beat drops, transitioning the audio into a rap mashup while maintaining the holiday melody.
Interactive UI elements appear, inviting the user to select two songs to mash up.
The mashup continues playing as the background party footage loops.
audience_proxy: Gen Z and Millennial music enthusiasts who enjoy viral mashups and creative audio editing tools.
